Petition For: Determination That The Mattie B. Lyons Revocable Trust Is Invalid And Imposition Of Constructive Trust-Undue Influence.
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Continued To Feb-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Trial
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Continued To Jan-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Terzian, via Zoom, for Barney Lyons, Sheena Lyons, Kareem Dawson, and Rashad Dawson, Petitioners; Dennis Vann, via Zoom, for Harold Lyons, Objector.

Mr. Terzian reports that the settlement document has been finalized and that he plans to file a Request for Dismissal as soon as additional items pursuant to the agreement have been effected.

The court advises that it will be continuing this matter one additional time to Jan-25-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

Petition For: Determination That The Mattie B. Lyons Revocable Trust Is Invalid And Imposition Of Constructive Trust-Undue Influence.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Trial
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Continued To Dec-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Terzian, via Zoom, for Barney Lyons, Sheena Lyons, Kareem Dawson, and Rashad Dawson, Petitioners; Dennis Vann, via Zoom, for Harold Lyons, Objector.

The court confirms with counsel that this matter has entirely settled, and that Mr. Terzian plans to file a Request for Dismissal as soon as the settlement terms have been finalized.

The subject matters are continued to Dec-14-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court advises that no appearance will be required if the requisite filing has been completed by Dec-07-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Oct-19-2022 Continued To Nov-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For: Determination That The Mattie B. Lyons Revocable Trust Is Invalid And Imposition Of Constructive Trust-Undue Influence.
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Continued To Oct-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Terzian, via Zoom, for Barney Lyons, Sheena Lyons, Kareem Dawson, and Rashad Dawson, Petitioners; Dennis Vann, via Zoom, for Harold Lyons, Respondent.

Counsel offers updates regarding the status of this matter. Mr. Terzian advises that some subpoenas have been issued and there has been some traction for ongoing settlement discussions and that the parties have discussed possibly filing a stipulation to continue the trial to allow for additional settlement discussions. The court offers its position regarding the trial date and advises that it is not inclined to move the date unless counsel submits compelling evidence for the court's consideration. Mr. Vann reports of ongoing efforts to make a settlement offer sometime next week. The court summarizes how it intends to handle this matter at the next calling if it sends the case to Dept. 206 for trial assignment.

After additional discussion, the Case Management Hearing is taken off calendar and the Petition is continued to Oct-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

Petition For: Determination That The Mattie B. Lyons Revocable Trust Is Invalid And Imposition Of Constructive Trust-Undue Influence.
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Continued To Aug-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Terzian appeared by zoom for Barney Lyons (petitioner).
Dennis Vann appeared by zoom for Harold Lyons (respondent).

The court stated that it eventually got a joint case management statement which is helpful, that going forward it needs to be flushed out a little bit more for the next calling, that it understands there was confusion about calendaring and responsibilities under the case management order, that it trusts that those issues have been resolved and that it never got a mediation statement. Mr. Terzian apologized to the court, stated that it won't happen again, that they mediated and that it has been moving along. The court stated that the point of this is so the court is informed timely and to prevent the court form issuing unnecessary orders, and reminded counsel of their obligations to the court. The sanctions order is discharged at this time. The court informed counsel that they get one pass. Mr. Vann stated that they had a mediation session, that a settlement was opposed by Mr. Terzian's client, that things occurred that were beyond their control such as the increase in interest rates and that the offer still stands. Mr. Terzian asked about continuing the trial date to see if a settlement can be done. The court informed counsel that it does not have a proper request to continue the trial and encouraged the parties to look at the big picture/the whole picture. Mr. Terzian stated that he will continue to meet and confer with Mr. Vann. The Petition for Determination that The Mattie B. Lyons Revocable Trust is Invalid and Imposition of Constructive Trust-Undue Influence is continued to August 24, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: H. Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Continued To Jun-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For: Determination That The Mattie B. Lyons Revocable Trust Is Invalid And Imposition Of Constructive Trust-Undue Influence.
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Continued To Jun-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Apr-06-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For: Determination That The Mattie B. Lyons Revocable Trust Is Invalid And Imposition Of Constructive Trust-Undue Influence.
Off Calendar Apr-06-2022 Continued To Jun-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Terzian, via Zoom, for Barney and Sheena Lyons, and Kareem and Rashad Dawson, Petitioners; Dennis Vann, via Zoom, for Harold Lyons, Objector.

The court stated that no mediation statement was filed as previously ordered. Mr. Terzian reports that the parties have made progress and plan to continue settlement discussions. Mr. Terzian reports that some Discovery has been completed and that this matter should be ready for trial soon if the parties are unable to reach a settlement. Mr. Vann reports that he has spoken with the drafting attorney and has some pending Discovery and possible Depositions before he is ready for trial, likely by October. The court confirms that Mr. Vann's client resides at the trust property. The court advises counsel that it intends to issue a Case Management Order, soon.

The Status of Mediation of taken off calendar. The Petition for Determination, etc., is continued to Jun-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A case management hearing is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Jan-26-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For: Determination That The Mattie B. Lyons Revocable Trust Is Invalid And Imposition Of Constructive Trust-Undue Influence.
Off Calendar Jan-26-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Terzian, via ZOOM, for Barney Lyons, Sheena Lyons, Kareem Dawson, and Rashad Dawson, Petitioners.

The court notes that Mr. Vann is not present this morning and asks Mr. Terzian if he has heard from Mr. Vann. Mr. Terzian reports that he has not heard from Mr. Vann. Mr. Terzian advises that it has been difficult to schedule the mediation and the delay in doing so has been largely COVID related but a mediation is scheduled for Mar-23-2022. Mr. Terzian advises that as requested by the court, a family tree will be filed by the next hearing. The court advises Mr. Terzian that it is extending the deadline to complete mediation to Mar-31-2022. The court then asks regarding setting a trial date. Mr. Terzian advises that he prefers the court to set a trial date today to provide some urgency to mediate. The court states that it is hesitant to set to set a trial date without Mr. Vann present and instructs Mr. Terzian to meet and confer with Mr. Vann regarding potential trial dates.

The matters on today's calendar are continued to Apr-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Primus. Not reported.

Petition For: Determination That The Mattie B. Lyons Revocable Trust Is Invalid And Imposition Of Constructive Trust-Undue Influence.
Off Calendar Oct-20-2021 Continued To Jan-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Katherine Hoffman, via ZOOM, for Barney Lyons, Sheena Lyons, Kareem Dawson, and Rashad Dawson, Petitioners.

The court queries Counsel regarding the status of this matter. Counsel advises that an amendment to the petition was filed and a response was filed thereafter. Counsel reports that discovery is pending but that the matter should be ready for trial soon. The court confirms with counsel that this matter meets the criteria to be referred to pro bono mediation. The Court advises counsel that the parties are being ordered to participate in mediation and the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation is signed in open court. Mediation must be completed no later than Jan-19-2022. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Jan-20-2022. The Parties are to return on Jan-26-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Counsel is to monitor the Court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the order to mediation. Counsel is instructed to advise opposing counsel regarding the order to mediation.

The Petition for Determination, etc., is continued to Jan-26-2022 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
